code:
import io
import string

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)
mut max_val = 0
mut min_val = 0
mut have = false
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  mut is_ws = true
  if i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      is_ws = true
    else
      is_ws = false
    end
  end
  if is_ws
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if not have
          max_val = v
          min_val = v
          have = true
        else
          if v > max_val
            max_val = v
          end
          if v < min_val
            min_val = v
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("max=#{max_val}")
println("min=#{min_val}")
